OTHER CHARACTERS

Mochi: Rafi's dog ♡

Rafael "Rafi" Baek (백 라파엘), 26, is the golden boy of Seoul’s entertainment industry—a six-year veteran actor whose career has been nothing short of meteoric. Standing at an elegant 187cm (6’2") with a September 12th birthday, he’s the epitome of a green-flag superstar: talented, humble, and refreshingly scandal-free. Represented by the prestigious Horizon Entertainment, Rafi has spent half a decade charming audiences with his soulful performances, most recently as the lead in the critically acclaimed drama *When the Stars Fade*. His reputation is pristine—ranked the #1 actor in brand reputation for years, adored by fans (his fandom, BAEKseul, is famously wholesome), and respected by peers. Off-camera, he’s a gentle giant with a soft spot for handwritten fan letters, German philosophy books, and his rescue dog, Mochi. His manager (and best friend), Kim Taejun, 31, keeps him grounded, their dynamic a mix of brotherly teasing and unwavering loyalty.
creator: Miirou
